V004-N00014.pinyinNames: fú zhèng gù běn; fu zheng gu ben
V004-N00014.definition: A principle to reinforce anti-pathogenic qi to speed up recovery. It is indicated for deficiency of anti-pathogenic qi.

V004-N00031.label: 调整阴阳
V004-N00031.definition: 根据机体阴阳盛衰的变化而损其有余或补其不足，使之重归于和谐平衡。

V004-N00031.label: 调理阴阳
V004-N00031.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜总论
V004-N00031.definition: 又称"调整阴阳”。利用药物或食物的气味性能、情志的属性、针灸补泻的作用等，以纠正人体阴阳的偏胜偏衰，使之恢复相对平衡协调的治疗原则。

V004-N00031.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V004-N00031.label: 调整阴阳
V004-N00031.aliases: 调理阴阳； 调和阴阳
V004-N00031.path: 中医诊断治疗技术和设备｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治则
V004-N00031.definition: 属治则利用药物或食物气味性能的偏胜，或情志的属性，或针灸补泻作用等，以纠正阴阳的偏胜偏衰，使之恢复相对平衡协调的治疗原则[5]。

V004-N00031.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V004-N00031.label: 调理阴阳
V004-N00031.path: 中医诊断治疗技术和设备｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治则｜调整阴阳

V004-N00031.label: 调整阴阳
V004-N00031.aliases: 调和阴阳； 调理阴阳
V004-N00031.definition: 利用药物或食物气味性能的偏胜，或情志的属性，或针灸补泻作用等，以纠正阴阳的偏胜偏衰，使之恢复相对平衡协调的治疗原则。

V004-N00031.label: 调理阴阳
V004-N00031.aliases: 调平阴阳； 调整阴阳
V004-N00031.englishNames: regulating yin and yang; coordinating yin and yang

V004-N00031.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V004-N00031.label: 调理阴阳
V004-N00031.aliases: 调平阴阳； 调整阴阳
V004-N00031.englishNames: Regulate and balance yin and yang; regulating yin and yang
V004-N00031.definition: A principle to restore yin-yang equilibrium through medicines, food, emotions or reinforcing/reducing needling techniques.

V004-N00033.label: 从阳引阴
V004-N00033.definition: 病在阴而治其阳。与“阴病治阳”义近。针法原则。从阳分引出阴分的邪气或正气。病在阴经而选取阳经穴位治之。

V004-N00033.label: 阳中求阴
V004-N00033.definition: 根据阴阳互根理论，治疗阴虚之证宜滋阴之中佐以扶阳。

V004-N00033.label: 从阳引阴
V004-N00033.englishNames: Lead Yin-Evil out through Yang Points
V004-N00033.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜针灸原理｜针灸治疗原理｜针灸治则术语
V004-N00033.definition: 针刺方法。指病在阴经而选阳经的穴位治疗。

V004-N00033.label: 从阳引阴
V004-N00033.path: 治法｜治则类术语｜调理阴阳

V004-N00033.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V004-N00033.label: 从阳引阴
V004-N00033.aliases: 阳中求阴； 病在阳而治其阴
V004-N00033.englishNames: Seeking yin from yang; treating yang for yin disorder; treating yin for yang disorder; seeking yin from yang
V004-N00033.pinyinNames: cóng yáng yǐn yīn; cong yang yin yin
V004-N00033.definition: This is originally a needling method to puncture yang meridians for problems of yin meridians. Later, this method has been developed into a principle based on interdependence between yin and yang: to add some yang-reinforcing medicines to yin-nourishing formulas to assist the generation of yin qi.

V004-N00033.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V004-N00033.label: 阳中求阴
V004-N00033.englishNames: Formulas that seek yin within yang
V004-N00033.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V004-N00033.definition: A method to combine a small amount of yang-tonifying medicines for kidney yin deficiency. This method enhances the effect of nourishing yin. The representative formula is Zuo Gui Wan (Left-Restoring Pill).

V004-N00033.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V004-N00033.label: 阳中求阴

V004-N00032.label: 从阴引阳
V004-N00032.definition: 病在阳而治其阴。与“阳病治阴”义近。针法原则。从阴分引出阳分的邪气或正气。病在阳经而选取阴经穴位治之。

V004-N00032.label: 阴中求阳
V004-N00032.definition: 根据阴阳互根理论，治疗阳虚之证宜扶阳之中佐以滋阴。

V004-N00032.label: 从阴引阳
V004-N00032.englishNames: Lead Yang-Evil out through Yin Points
V004-N00032.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜针灸原理｜针灸治疗原理｜针灸治则术语
V004-N00032.definition: 针刺方法。刺募穴以治阳病，引邪从募穴而出。

V004-N00032.label: 从阴引阳
V004-N00032.path: 治法｜治则类术语｜调理阴阳

V004-N00032.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V004-N00032.label: 从阴引阳
V004-N00032.aliases: 病在阳而治其阴； 阴中求阳
V004-N00032.englishNames: treating yin for yang disorder; treating yang for yin disorder; Seeking yang from yin; seeking yang from yin
V004-N00032.pinyinNames: cong yin yin yang; cóng yīn yǐn yáng
V004-N00032.definition: This is originally a needling method to puncture yin meridians for problems of yang meridians. Later, this method has been developed into a treatment principle based on interdependence between yin and yang: to add some yin-nourishing medicines to yang-reinforcing formulas to assist the transformation of yang qi.

V004-N00032.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V004-N00032.label: 阴中求阳
V004-N00032.englishNames: Formulas that seek yang within yin
V004-N00032.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V004-N00032.definition: Formulas to combine a small amount of yin-nourishing medicines for kidney yang deficiency. This method enhances the effect of warming yang. The representative formula is You Gui Wan (Right-Restoring Pill).

V004-N00032.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V004-N00032.label: 阴中求阳

V004-N00016.label: 攻补兼施
V004-N00016.definition: 虚实错杂且正虚邪实相当，采取扶正与祛邪兼顾的方法治疗。

V004-N00016.label: 攻补兼施
V004-N00016.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜总论
V004-N00016.definition: 对于虚实夹杂，或虚实病情相当的病证，可采用既祛邪又培补，即攻邪与扶正并重的治疗原则。

V004-N00016.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V004-N00016.label: 攻补兼施
V004-N00016.path: 中医诊断治疗技术和设备｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治法｜八法｜补法
V004-N00016.definition: 属补法；IM用于总论；宜用专指词对于虚实夹杂，或虚实病情相当的病证，可采用既扶正又祛邪、即祛邪与扶正并重的治疗原则[5]。

V004-N00016.label: 攻补兼施
V004-N00016.definition: 对于虚实夹杂，或虚实病情相当的病证，可采用既扶正又祛邪，即祛邪与扶正并重的治疗原则。

V004-N00016.label: 攻补兼施
V004-N00016.englishNames: treating with both elimination and reinforcement; reinforcing healthy qi and eliminating pathogenic factor; reinforcement and elimination in combination

V004-N00016.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V004-N00016.label: 攻补兼施
V004-N00016.englishNames: treat with both elimination and reinforcement; Reinforce healthy qi and remove pathogenic factors simultaneously; treating with both elimination and reinforcement; simultaneous eliminination and reinforcement; Reinforcement and Elimination
V004-N00016.pinyinNames: gōng bǔ jiān shī; gong bu jian shi
V004-N00016.definition: A principle to reinforce anti-pathogenic qi and, at the same time, remove pathogenic factors. It is indicated for excessive pathogenic factors coupled with deficiency of healthy qi.

V004-N00016.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V004-N00016.label: 攻补兼施
V004-N00016.englishNames: reinforcing healthy qi and eliminating pathogenic factor

V004-N00016.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V004-N00016.label: 攻补兼施
V004-N00016.englishNames: simultaneous eliminination and reinforcement; treat with both elimination and reinforcement; reinforcement and elimination in combination
V004-N00016.definition: a principle of treatment with eliminating and reinforcing methods used in combination, suitable for patients with a weak constitution suffering from an excess syndrome

V004-N00017.label: 先攻后补
V004-N00017.definition: 邪盛而正虚，正气尚耐攻伐，采取先祛邪后扶正的方法治疗。

V004-N00017.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V004-N00017.label: 先攻后补
V004-N00017.path: 中医诊断治疗技术和设备｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治法｜八法｜补法｜攻补兼施
V004-N00017.definition: 属攻补兼施先攻邪后培补的治疗原则，用于体弱正虚而又有急须攻下或攻破之症的病证[5]。

V004-N00017.label: 先攻后补
V004-N00017.path: 治则治法｜治则｜攻补兼施
V004-N00017.definition: 先攻邪后培补的治疗原则，用于体弱正虚而又有急须攻下或攻破之症的病证。

V004-N00017.label: 先攻后补
V004-N00017.englishNames: application of elimination prior to tonification
V004-N00017.path: 治法｜治则类术语｜攻补兼施

V004-N00017.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V004-N00017.label: 先攻后补
V004-N00017.englishNames: eliminating pathogenic factors prior to reinforcing healthy qi; Remove pathogenic factors before reinforcing healthy qi; Attacking the Pathogens before Tonifying; reinforcement after elimination
V004-N00017.pinyinNames: xiān gōng hòu bǔ; xian gong hou bu
V004-N00017.definition: A principle to remove the invading pathogenic factors, followed by reinforcing anti-pathogenic qi. It is indicated for deficiency of healthy qi coupled with acute conditions that require immediate removal of pathogenic factors.

V004-N00020.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V004-N00020.label: 寓补于攻
V004-N00020.path: 中医诊断治疗技术和设备｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治法｜八法｜补法｜攻补兼施
V004-N00020.definition: 为治疗虚实夹杂病证的一种策略。一指通过攻邪，使邪去而正安，最后达至补益的目的。一指将少量补益之品夹于大队攻伐药之内，使攻邪而不伤正[5] 。

V004-N00020.label: 寓补于攻
V004-N00020.path: 治则治法｜治则｜攻补兼施
V004-N00020.definition: 为治疗虚实夹杂病证的一种策略。一指通过攻邪，使邪去而正安，最后达至补益的目的。一指将少量补益之品夹于大队攻伐药之内，使攻邪而不伤正。

V004-N00020.label: 寓补于攻
V004-N00020.path: 治法｜治则类术语｜攻补兼施

V004-N00019.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V004-N00019.label: 寓攻于补
V004-N00019.path: 中医诊断治疗技术和设备｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治法｜八法｜补法｜攻补兼施
V004-N00019.definition:
属中医历代典籍中医医案类著作；清代喻昌撰于1643年；前有医论
2篇，强调治病必先识病，继收疑难治案60余则；首立中医病案格式，并以层层设问方式阐明案中关键和难点[12]。编目：/资料类型

V004-N00019.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V004-N00019.label: 补中寓攻
V004-N00019.path: 中医诊断治疗技术和设备｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治法｜八法｜补法｜攻补兼施｜寓攻于补

V004-N00019.label: 寓攻于补
V004-N00019.path: 治则治法｜治则｜攻补兼施
V004-N00019.definition: 为治疗虚实夹杂病症的一种策略。一指将攻邪目的寓寄于补正之中，通过补正为主，待正气来复而能驱邪以愈病。一指在补益方药中，适当加入一、二味攻邪之品，使扶正而不留邪。

V004-N00019.label: 寓攻于补
V004-N00019.path: 治法｜治则类术语｜攻补兼施

V004-N00018.label: 先补后攻
V004-N00018.definition: 正虚而邪实，正气虚衰难以耐受攻伐，采取先扶正后祛邪的方法治疗。

V004-N00018.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V004-N00018.label: 先补后攻
V004-N00018.path: 中医诊断治疗技术和设备｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治法｜八法｜补法｜攻补兼施
V004-N00018.definition: 属攻补兼施先补虚后攻邪的治疗原则，用于需攻破或攻下而又正虚体弱不堪攻的病证[5]。

V004-N00018.label: 先补后攻
V004-N00018.path: 治则治法｜治则｜攻补兼施
V004-N00018.definition: 先补虚后攻邪的治疗原则，用于需攻破或攻下而又正虚体弱不堪攻的病证。

V004-N00018.label: 先补后攻
V004-N00018.englishNames: application of tonification prior to elimination
V004-N00018.path: 治法｜治则类术语｜攻补兼施

V004-N00018.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V004-N00018.label: 先补后攻
V004-N00018.englishNames: elimination after reinforcement; reinforcing healthy qi prior to eliminating pathogenic factors; Reinforce healthy qi before removing pathogenic factors; Tonifying before Attacking the Pathogens
V004-N00018.pinyinNames: xiān bǔ hòu gōng; xian bu hou gong
V004-N00018.definition: A principle to reinforce healthy qi, followed by removing the invading pathogenic factors. It is indicated for acute conditions that require immediate removal of pathogneic factors coupled with deficiency of healthy qi.

V004-N00010.label: 因时制宜
V004-N00010.definition: 根据四时气候的阴阳消长变化而采取适宜的治疗方法。

V004-N00010.label: 因时制宜
V004-N00010.englishNames: treatment in accordance with seasonal conditions
V004-N00010.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜总论
V004-N00010.definition: 考虑到时令气候寒热燥湿的不同而选择适宜的治法、方药的治疗原则。

V004-N00010.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V004-N00010.label: 因时制宜
V004-N00010.englishNames: Treatment in Accordance with Seasonal Conditions
V004-N00010.path: 中医诊断治疗技术和设备｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治则｜三因治宜
V004-N00010.definition: 属三因治宜在治病时，应考虑到时令气候等的不同，而选择适宜的方法、药物等进行治疗的原则[5]。

V004-N00010.label: 因时制宜
V004-N00010.englishNames: Treatment in Accordance with Seasonal Conditions
V004-N00010.path: 治则治法｜治则｜三因治宜
V004-N00010.definition: 在治病时，应考虑到时令气候等的不同，而选择适宜的方法、药物等进行治疗的原则。

V004-N00010.label: 因时制宜
V004-N00010.englishNames: treatment in accordance with seasons; treatment in accordance with seasonal conditions

V004-N00010.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V004-N00010.label: 因时制宜
V004-N00010.englishNames: Treatment in Accordance with Seasonal Conditions; Treat according to time; treatment in accordance with seasons; treatment in accordance with time
V004-N00010.pinyinNames: yin shi zhi yi; yīn shí zhì yí
V004-N00010.definition: A principle to use an appropriate method and medicine according to seasonal climate changes.

V004-N00026.label: 反治法
V004-N00026.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜总论
V004-N00026.definition: 又称"从治法”。针对疾病出现假象,或大寒证、大热证用正治法发生格拒的情况，采用与表面症状性质相同的药物进行治疗，亦即顺从疾病假象而治,与常规相反的方法。

V004-N00026.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V004-N00026.label: 反治法
V004-N00026.definition: A principle to address false signs or symptoms in extreme conditions such as extreme cold or heat. Under such conditions, it is necessary to use medicines similar in nature to the disease (i.e. follow the false symptoms), for example, to treat false heat with heat or treat false cold with cold.

V004-N00026.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V004-N00026.label: 反治
V004-N00026.englishNames: treatment contrary to routine; paradoxical treatment
V004-N00026.definition: use of medicines similar in nature to the disease

V004-N00029.label: 塞因塞用
V004-N00029.definition: 用补益、固涩方药或具有补益、固涩功效的措施治疗真虚假实证的原则。

V004-N00029.label: 塞因塞用
V004-N00029.englishNames: treating obstructive syndrome with tonifying methods
V004-N00029.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜总论
V004-N00029.definition: 针对正气虚损所致闭塞不通病证应采用补益、固涩方药进行治疗的原则。

V004-N00029.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V004-N00029.label: 塞因塞用
V004-N00029.path: 中医诊断治疗技术和设备｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治则｜反治
V004-N00029.definition: 属反治用补益或固涩的方药，治疗因正虚所致闭塞不通病症的方法[5]。

V004-N00029.label: 塞因塞用
V004-N00029.definition: 用补益或固涩的方药，治疗因正虚所致闭塞不通病症的方法。

V004-N00029.label: 塞因塞用
V004-N00029.englishNames: treating the stopped by stopping; treating obstructive syndrome with tonifying methods
V004-N00029.path: 治法｜治则类术语｜反治法

V004-N00029.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

V004-N00023.label: 热者寒之
V004-N00023.definition: 用寒凉方药或具有寒凉功效的措施治疗热性病证的原则。

V004-N00023.label: 热者寒之
V004-N00023.englishNames: treating heat syndrome with cold methods
V004-N00023.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜总论
V004-N00023.definition: 针对热性的病证应使用寒凉方药进行治疗的原则。

V004-N00023.label: 热者寒之
V004-N00023.englishNames: treating heat syndrome with cold methods; treating heat with cold
V004-N00023.path: 治法｜治则类术语｜正治法

V004-N00023.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V004-N00023.label: 热者寒之
V004-N00023.englishNames: treating hotness with coldness; treat heat with cold; Treat heat with cold; treating heat with cold
V004-N00023.definition: A principle to treat heat conditions with medicines or formulas that are cool or cold in nature.

V004-N00023.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V004-N00023.label: 热者寒之

V004-N00023.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V004-N00023.label: 热者寒之
V004-N00023.definition: treat heat conditions with cold or cooling method

V004-N00007.label: 急则治标
V004-N00007.definition: 与缓则治本相对。标病危急，先治其标，标病愈后再治本病。

V004-N00007.label: 急则治标
V004-N00007.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜总论
V004-N00007.definition: 与缓则治本相对而言，在大出血、暴泻、剧痛等标症甚急的情况下，及时救治标病，如止血、止泻、止痛等，然后治其本病的治疗原则。

V004-N00007.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V004-N00007.label: 治标
V004-N00007.path: 中医诊断治疗技术和设备｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治则｜标本论治
V004-N00007.definition: 属标本论治与缓则治本相对而言。在大出血、暴泻、剧痛等标症甚急的情况下．应及时救治标症，如止血、止泻、止痛等，然后治其本病的治疗原则[5]。

V004-N00007.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V004-N00007.label: 急则治标
V004-N00007.englishNames:
Y治标
ji zhi tang jiang Jl zhi tang jiang
急支糖浆Ji Zhi Tang Jiang
V004-N00007.path: 中药和方剂｜中成药｜产复康冲剂｜止咳化痰平喘剂
V004-N00007.definition: 由鱼腥草、金荞麦、四季青、麻黄、紫菀、前胡、枳壳、甘草组成，具有清热化痰、宣肺止咳的功效，临床用于治疗外感风热所致的咳嗽、症见发热、恶寒、胸膈满闷、咳嗽咽痛；急性支气管炎、慢性支气管炎急性发作见上述证候者[1]。

V004-N00007.label: 急则治标
V004-N00007.path: 治则治法｜治则｜标本论治
V004-N00007.definition: 与缓则治本相对而言，在大出血、暴泻、剧痛等标症甚急的情况下，及时救治标病，如止血、止泻、止痛等，然后治其本病的治疗原则。

V004-N00007.label: 急则治标
V004-N00007.englishNames: symptomatic treatment in acute condition; treating the tip in acute disease

V004-N00007.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V004-N00007.label: 急则治标
V004-N00007.englishNames: treating symptom for urgency; Treat the tip first in acute conditions; treating the tip in acute phases; ji ze zhi biao
V004-N00007.pinyinNames: jí zé zhì biāo; Symptomatic Treatment in Acute Condition
V004-N00007.definition: A principle to address symptoms in acute conditions, for example, it is important to stop bleeding for heavy blood loss, to arrest diarrhoea for fulminant diarrhoea, alleviate pain for severe, intense pain and promote urination for urine retention.

V004-N00034.label: 虚者补其母
V004-N00034.definition: 根据五行相生和五脏母子关系理论，五脏虚证补其属母(生我)之脏以治。

V004-N00034.label: 虚者补其母
V004-N00034.englishNames: reinforcing mother viscera for treating deficiency of child viscera
V004-N00034.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜总论
V004-N00034.definition: 又称"虚则补其母”。根据五行相生和五脏母子关系的理论，对于五脏虚证应采用补益“生我"之脏的方药进行治疗的原则。

V004-N00034.label: 虚则补其母
V004-N00034.englishNames: Reinforcing Mother Viscera for Treating Deficiency of Child Viscera
V004-N00034.definition: 根据五行相生和五脏母子关系的理论，对于五脏虚证应采用补益“生我”之脏的方药进行治疗的原则。

V004-N00034.label: 虚者补其母
V004-N00034.englishNames: nourishing the mother-organ in dealing with deficiency syndrome/patterns; reinforcing mother viscera for treating deficiency of child viscera

V004-N00034.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V004-N00034.label: 虚者补其母
V004-N00034.englishNames: Reinforce the mother (element) for deficiency pattern; reinforcing mother-element in deficiency condition; nourishing the mother-organ in dealing for deficiency syndrome/patterns
V004-N00034.definition: A principle to treat deficiency of zang–fu organs based on the five-element theory. For example, since (spleen) earth promotes (lung) metal, lung deficiency can be treated by reinforcing the spleen and stomach.

V004-N00005.label: 未病先防
V004-N00005.definition: 在疾病发生之前，采取各种措施，增强机体的正气，消除有害因素的侵袭，保护促进健康，以防止疾病的发生。

V004-N00005.label: 未病先防
V004-N00005.definition: 在未发生疾病之时做好预防工作。正气不足是发病的内在根据，邪气是发病的重要条件。未病先防重在保养正气和防御病邪两方面，主要方法有顺应自然、调摄精神、运动保健、饮食有节、起居规律、劳逸适度等，以增强体质，提高正气抗邪能力;；讲究卫生、避免外邪、药物预防、人工免疫等，以防止病邪的侵袭。

V004-N00005.label: 未病先防
V004-N00005.path: 治法｜治则类术语｜治未病法

V004-N00005.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V004-N00005.label: 未病先防
V004-N00005.englishNames: Preventing a disease before it arises
V004-N00005.path: 中医基础理论术语｜养生预防类
V004-N00005.definition: A method to strengthen the healthy qi and eliminate potential harmful factors to prevent the occurrence of a disease.

V004-N00005.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V004-N00005.label: 未病先防

V004-N00006.label: 已病防变
V004-N00006.definition: 疾病发生之后，早期诊断，早期治疗，见微知著，防微杜渐，以防止疾病的发展和传变。

V004-N00006.label: 既病防变
V004-N00006.definition: 疾病已经发生，应早期诊断，并根据疾病的发展规律，早期治疗，以防止疾病传变。

V004-N00006.label: 已病防变
V004-N00006.path: 治法｜治则类术语｜治未病法

V004-N00006.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V004-N00006.label: 既病防变
V004-N00006.englishNames: Preventing transmission of a disease after its onset
V004-N00006.path: 中医基础理论术语｜养生预防类
V004-N00006.definition: A method to use early diagnosis and early intervention to prevent disease progression and transmission.

V004-N00006.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V004-N00006.label: 既病防变

V004-N00004.label: 瘥后防复
V004-N00004.definition: 疾病初愈、缓解或痊愈时，预防疾病的复发。

V004-N00004.label: 瘥后防复
V004-N00004.pinyinNames: chai hou fang fu; 瘥hou fang fu
V004-N00004.path: 治法｜治则类术语｜治未病法

V004-N00012.label: 因人制宜
V004-N00012.definition: 根据病人的个体差异而采取适宜的治疗方法。

V004-N00012.label: 因人制宜
V004-N00012.englishNames: treatment in accordance with patient's individuality
V004-N00012.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜总论
V004-N00012.definition: 考虑到病人的体质、性别、年龄、生活习惯以及过去病史等个体差异性而选择适宜的治法、方药的治疗原则。

V004-N00012.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V004-N00012.label: 因人制宜
V004-N00012.path: 中医诊断治疗技术和设备｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治则｜三因治宜
V004-N00012.definition: 属三因治宜在治病时，应考虑到病人体质等个体差异，而选择适宜的方法、药物等进行治疗的原则[5]。

V004-N00012.label: 因人制宜
V004-N00012.englishNames: Treatment in Accordance with Patient's Individuality
V004-N00012.path: 治则治法｜治则｜三因治宜
V004-N00012.definition: 在治病时，应考虑到病人体质等个体差异，而选择适宜的方法、药物等进行治疗的原则。

V004-N00012.label: 因人制宜
V004-N00012.englishNames: treatment in accordance with patient's individuality; treatment in accordance with individuality

V004-N00012.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V004-N00012.label: 因人制宜
V004-N00012.englishNames: Treatment in Accordance with Patient's Individuality; treatment in accordance with individual; treatment in accordance with individualized conditions; Treat according to person
V004-N00012.pinyinNames: yin ren zhi yi; yīn rén zhì yí
V004-N00012.definition: A principle to use an appropriate method and medicine according to individual gender, age and constitution.

V004-N00008.label: 缓则治本
V004-N00008.definition: 与急则治标相对。病势缓和，病情缓慢，先治其本，本病愈而标病自除。

V004-N00008.label: 缓则治本
V004-N00008.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜总论
V004-N00008.definition: 与急则治标相对而言，在病势缓和、病情缓慢的情况下，针对本病的病机治疗或采取调理、补益为主的治疗原则。

V004-N00008.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V004-N00008.label: 治本
V004-N00008.path: 中医诊断治疗技术和设备｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治则｜标本论治

V004-N00008.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V004-N00008.label: 缓则治本
V004-N00008.path: 中医诊断治疗技术和设备｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治则｜标本论治｜治本

V004-N00008.label: 缓则治本
V004-N00008.path: 治则治法｜治则｜标本论治
V004-N00008.definition: 与急则治标相对而言，在病势缓和、病情缓慢的情况下，针对本病的病机治疗或采取调理、补益为主的治疗原则。

V004-N00008.label: 缓则治本
V004-N00008.englishNames: radical treatment in chronic case; treating the root in chronic disease

V004-N00008.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V004-N00008.label: 缓则治本
V004-N00008.englishNames: treating the root in remissive phases; Treat the root in remissive stages; treating root cause for non-urgency; Radical Treatment in Chronic Case
V004-N00008.pinyinNames: huǎn zé zhì běn; huan ze zhi ben
V004-N00008.definition: A principle to regulate and reinforce the body to address the root cause when medical conditions become stable.

V004-N00097.label: 和法
V004-N00097.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜医史文献｜其他
V004-N00097.definition: 具有和解作用的治疗大法。

V004-N00097.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V004-N00097.label: 和法
V004-N00097.path: 中医诊断治疗技术和设备｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治法｜八法
V004-N00097.definition: 为组配词，宜用专指词运用药性平和的方药以调理机体治疗疾病的方法[7]。 。

V004-N00097.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V004-N00097.label: 和解
V004-N00097.path: 中医诊断治疗技术和设备｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治法｜八法｜和法

V004-N00097.label: 合推法
V004-N00097.path: 中医操作/方法｜治疗方法/操作｜其他疗法｜推拿｜推拿手法｜成人推拿手法｜摩擦类手法｜推法
V004-N00097.definition: 用双手拇指与掌面自穴位两旁向穴中合拢推动的手法。

V004-N00097.label: 和解法
V004-N00097.definition: 用具有疏通表里、和解寒热、调和脏腑作用的方药治疗疾病的治法。

V004-N00097.label: 和解法
V004-N00097.englishNames: harmonizing and releasing therapy; reconciliation method; Reconciliation Method; harmonizing method

V004-N00097.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V004-N00097.label: 和解法
V004-N00097.englishNames: harmonizing and releasing therapy; methods to harmonize and release; reconciliation method; Methods to harmonize and release; Reconciliation Method; harmonizing method
V004-N00097.pinyinNames: he jie fa; hé jiě fǎ
V004-N00097.definition: Treatment methods to harmonize and release pathogenic factors affecting Shaoyang or coordinate functions of the zang–fu organs.

V004-N00097.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V004-N00097.label: 和法
V004-N00097.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V004-N00097.definition: A method to moderate different parts of the body to expel pathogenic factors and regulate functions of the zang–fu organs. It helps to achieve yin-yang or interior–exterior balance by releasing the Shaoyang pattern when the pathogen lies in between the interior and exterior of the body and by harmonizing zang–fu organs.

V004-N00097.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V004-N00097.label: 和法

V004-N00097.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V004-N00097.label: 和解法

V004-N00097.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V004-N00097.label: 和法
V004-N00097.definition: one of the eight principal therapeutic methods to regulate the functions of visceral organs for restoring their normal correlation or to mediate the part between the exterior and interior of the body for eliminating the pathogens

V004-N00117.label: 疏肝和胃
V004-N00117.englishNames: dispersing stagnated liver qi forregulating stomach
V004-N00117.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜内治法
V004-N00117.definition: 用具有疏肝理气健胃作用的方药治疗肝胃气滞证、肝胃不和证等的治法。

V004-N00117.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V004-N00117.label: 疏肝和胃
V004-N00117.englishNames: Dispersing Stagnated LiverQi for Regulating Stomach
V004-N00117.path: 中医诊断治疗技术和设备｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治法｜脏腑治法｜脾胃病治法｜胃病治法｜调中和胃
V004-N00117.definition: 属脏腑兼治法；属调中和胃通过调理肝胃气机而使肝胃调和，适用于肝胃气滞、肝胃不和等证的治疗方法[5]。

V004-N00117.label: 疏肝和胃
V004-N00117.englishNames: Dispersing Stagnated Liver Qi for Regulating Stomach; dispersing stagnated liver qi for regulating stomach; soothe the liver and harmonize the stomach; soothing the liver and harmonizing the stomach
V004-N00117.path: 治法｜治法类术语｜和解法

V004-N00117.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V004-N00117.label: 疏肝和胃
V004-N00117.englishNames: Dispersing Stagnated Liver Qi for Regulating Stomach; Soothe the liver and harmonize the stomach; dispersing stagnated liver qi for regulating stomach; soothe the liver and harmonize the stomach; soothing the liver and harmonizing the stomach
V004-N00117.pinyinNames: shu gan he wei; shū gān hé wèi
V004-N00117.definition: A treatment method to regulate qi activity of the liver and stomach to harmonize between the liver and stomach. It is indicated for conditions due to qi stagnation of the liver and stomach or disharmony between the liver and stomach.

V004-N00117.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V004-N00117.label: 疏肝和胃
V004-N00117.englishNames: soothe the liver and harmonize the stomach
V004-N00117.definition: a therapeutic method of regulating the activities of the liver and stomach for treating liver-stomach qi stagnation and liver-stomach disharmony

V004-N00120.label: 泄肝和胃
V004-N00120.englishNames: purging the liver and harmonizing the stomach; Purging Liver Qi for Regulating Stomach
V004-N00120.path: 治法｜治法类术语｜和解法｜疏肝和胃

V004-N00118.label: 解郁和胃
V004-N00118.englishNames: releasing depression and harmonizing the stomach; Resolving Stagnation for Regulating  Stomach
V004-N00118.path: 治法｜治法类术语｜和解法｜疏肝和胃

V004-N00119.label: 抑肝和胃
V004-N00119.englishNames: suppressing the liver and harmonizing the stomach; Checking Liver Hyperfunction for Regulating Stomach
V004-N00119.path: 治法｜治法类术语｜和解法｜疏肝和胃

V004-N00104.label: 温清并用
V004-N00104.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜内治法
V004-N00104.definition: 用具有清热、温阳作用的方药治疗寒热错杂证的治法。

V004-N00104.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V004-N00104.label: 温清并用
V004-N00104.path: 中医诊断治疗技术和设备｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治法｜寒热治法｜寒热兼施
V004-N00104.definition: 属寒热兼施治疗寒热夹杂证的方法，清热药与温阳药并用，适用于寒热错杂证的治疗方法[5]。

V004-N00104.label: 温清并用法
V004-N00104.definition: 清热药与温阳药并用，适用于寒热错杂证的治疗方法。

V004-N00104.label: 寒温并用
V004-N00104.englishNames: application of both warming and clearing therapies
V004-N00104.path: 治法｜治法类术语｜和解法

V004-N00105.label: 平调寒热
V004-N00105.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜内治法
V004-N00105.definition: 用药性平和，具有清热、祛寒作用的方药，治疗阴阳寒热不调病证的治法。

V004-N00105.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V004-N00105.label: 平调寒热
V004-N00105.path: 中医诊断治疗技术和设备｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治法｜寒热治法｜寒热兼施
V004-N00105.definition: 为平和的方药， 适用于阴阳寒热不调所致病症的治疗方法[5]。

V004-N00105.label: 平调寒热
V004-N00105.englishNames: mildly regulating cold and heat; mild regulation of cold and heat; Mildly Regulating Cold and Heat
V004-N00105.pinyinNames: ping diao han re; ping tiao han re
V004-N00105.path: 治法｜治法类术语｜和解法｜寒温并用

V004-N00105.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V004-N00105.label: 平调寒热

V004-N00409.label: 补法
V004-N00409.aliases: Reinforcement； 补虚法； 补养法； 补益法
V004-N00409.definition: 又称补养法，补法。是补养人体气血阴阳的不足，治疗各种虚证的方法。虚证有气虚、血虚、阴虚、阳虚等不同，补法也分补气、补血、补阴、补阳等，并宜结合五脏之虚补益五脏。根据病情缓急和虚弱程度，又分为峻补与缓补。

V004-N00976.label: 接骨续筋

V004-N00976.definition: 又称“续筋接骨”。促进损伤断裂的筋骨愈合的治疗方法。

V004-N00976.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V004-N00976.label: 续筋接骨
V004-N00976.path: 中医诊断治疗技术和设备｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治法｜正骨疗法｜整复疗法
V004-N00976.definition: 属整复疗法通过推拿等手法或其他方法，使损伤断裂的筋骨得以整复的治疗方法。适用于筋骨损伤的病症[5]。

V004-N00976.label: 续筋接骨
V004-N00976.englishNames: Reunion of Fractured Tendons and Bones; reunion of fractured tendons and bones; reunion of broken sinews and fractured bones
V004-N00976.path: 治法｜治法类术语｜其他治法

V004-N00976.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V004-N00976.label: 续筋接骨
V004-N00976.englishNames: Reunion of Fractured Tendons and Bones; Repair broken sinews and bones; reunion of broken sinews and fractured bones; reunion of fractured tendons and bones
V004-N00976.pinyinNames: xu jin jie gu; xù jīn jiē gǔ
V004-N00976.definition: A treatment method to use tuina or other therapies to repair the broken sinews or bones. It is indicated for sinew or bone injuries.

V004-N00972.label: 交通心肾
V004-N00972.englishNames: restoring normal coordination between heart and kidney
V004-N00972.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜内治法
V004-N00972.definition: 用具有滋肾阴、敛肾阳、降心火、安心神作用的方药，以滋阴潜阳,沟通心肾，治疗心肾不交证的治法。

V004-N00972.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V004-N00972.label: 交通心肾
V004-N00972.path: 中医诊断治疗技术和设备｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治法｜脏腑治法｜脏腑兼治法｜调理心肾
V004-N00972.definition: 属脏腑兼治法通过滋肾阴、敛肾阳，降心火、安心神，达到滋阴潜阳、沟通心肾目的的治疗方法。适用于心肾不交、阴阳失调的证候[5]。

V004-N00972.label: 交通心肾
V004-N00972.englishNames: coordinate the heart and kidney; coordinating the heart and kidney; restoring normal coordination between heart and kidney; restoring coordination between heart and kidney; Restoring Normal Coordination Between Heart and Kidney
V004-N00972.path: 治法｜治法类术语｜其他治法

V004-N00972.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V004-N00972.label: 交通心肾
V004-N00972.englishNames: coordinate the heart and kidney; coordinating the heart and kidney; restoring normal coordination between heart and kidney; Coordinate the heart and kidney; restoring coordination between heart and kidney; Restoring Normal Coordination Between Heart and Kidney
V004-N00972.pinyinNames: jiao tong xin shen; jiāo tōng xīn shèn
V004-N00972.definition: A treatment method to nourish kidney yin, astringe kidney yang, reduce heart fire and calm the heart mind to submerge yang and coordinate between the heart and kidney. It is indicated for conditions due to disharmony between the heart fire and kidney water.

V004-N00972.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V004-N00972.label: 交通心肾
V004-N00972.englishNames: coordinate the heart and kidney; restoring coordination between heart and kidney

V004-N00972.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V004-N00972.label: 交通心肾
V004-N00972.definition: a therapeutic method of treating heart-kidney noninteraction by clearing heart fire and nourishing kidney yin

V004-N00983.label: 培土制水
V004-N00983.englishNames: banking up earth to control water
V004-N00983.path: 治法｜治法类术语｜其他治法

V004-N00983.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V004-N00983.label: 培土制水
V004-N00983.englishNames: fortifying earth to control water; banking up earth to control water; Cultivate earth to restrain water
V004-N00983.pinyinNames: pei tu zhi shui; péi tǔ zhì shuǐ
V004-N00983.definition: A treatment method to tonify the spleen (earth) to restrain overflow of water dampness. It is indicated for oedema or diarrhoea due to spleen deficiency.

V004-N00984.label: 泻南补北
V004-N00984.englishNames: purging the south and tonifying the north; purging south and nourishing north
V004-N00984.path: 治法｜治法类术语｜其他治法

V004-N00984.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V004-N00984.label: 泻南补北
V004-N00984.englishNames: purging the south and nourishing the north; purging the south and tonifying the north; purging south and nourishing north; Reduce the south to reinforce the north
V004-N00984.pinyinNames: xie nan bu bei; xiè nán bǔ běi
V004-N00984.definition: A treatment method to reduce heart fire and reinforce kidney water. The south here refers to heart fire, whereas the north refers to kidney water.

V004-N00984.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V004-N00984.label: 泻南补北

V004-N00975.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V004-N00975.label: 宽胸利膈
V004-N00975.path: 中医诊断治疗技术和设备｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治法｜病症防治
V004-N00975.definition: 属病症防治 通过祛邪理气，或升阳降浊，使胸膈得以舒畅的治 疗方法。适用于胸膈痞闷、胀满、梗塞的病症[5]。

V004-N00975.label: 宽胸利膈
V004-N00975.englishNames: Relieving Stuffiness of the Chest Diaphragm; soothing the chest and disinhibiting the diaphragm
V004-N00975.path: 治法｜治法类术语｜其他治法

V004-N00975.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V004-N00975.label: 宽胸利膈
V004-N00975.englishNames: Relieving Stuffiness of the Chest Diaphragm; soothing the chest and disinhibiting the diaphragm; Open the chest and sooth the diaphragm; soothing the chest and benefiting the diaphragm
V004-N00975.pinyinNames: kuan xiong li ge; kuān xiōng lì gé
V004-N00975.definition: A treatment method to eliminate pathogenic factors, regulate qi, lift yang, and down-regulate turbidity to soothe the chest and diaphragm. It is indicated for chest stuffiness, distension, fullness and tightness.

V004-N00969.label: 益火消阴
V004-N00969.englishNames: boosting source of fire for eliminating abundance of yin
V004-N00969.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜内治法
V004-N00969.definition: 用具有温补阳气作用的方药，使阳气旺而能消散阴寒，治疗因阳虚而阴寒偏盛的证候的治法。

V004-N00969.label: 益火消阴法
V004-N00969.englishNames: Boosting Source of Fire for Eliminating Abundance of Yin
V004-N00969.path: 治则治法｜治法｜补法｜补阳法
V004-N00969.definition: 采用温补阳气为主，使阳气旺而能消散阴寒的治疗方法。适用于因阳虚而阴寒偏胜的证候。

V004-N00969.label: 益火消阴
V004-N00969.englishNames: replenishing fire to disperse yin; Boosting Source of Fire for Eliminating Abundance of Yin; boosting source of fire for eliminating abundance of yin
V004-N00969.path: 治法｜治法类术语｜其他治法

V004-N00969.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V004-N00969.label: 益火消阴
V004-N00969.englishNames: replenishing fire to disperse yin; Boosting Source of Fire for Eliminating Abundance of Yin; boosting source of fire for eliminating abundance of yin; Warm yang to dissipate yin cold
V004-N00969.pinyinNames: yi huo xiao yin; yì huǒ xiāo yīn
V004-N00969.definition: A treatment method to warm and reinforce yang qi to dissipate yin cold. It is indicated for yin cold due to yang deficiency.

V004-N00985.label: 畜鱼置介
V004-N00985.path: 治法｜治法类术语｜其他治法

V004-N00987.label: 逆流挽舟
V004-N00987.path: 治法｜治法类术语｜其他治法

V004-N00981.label: 益火生土
V004-N00981.path: 治法｜治法类术语｜其他治法

V004-N00981.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V004-N00981.label: 益火生土
V004-N00981.englishNames: replenishing fire to generate earth; Supplement fire to cultivate earth
V004-N00981.pinyinNames: yi huo sheng tu; yì huǒ shēng tǔ
V004-N00981.definition: A treatment method to warm and reinforce the vital fire to supplement the transportation and transformation of the spleen (earth). It is indicated for early morning diarrhoea due to decline of the vital fire and spleen yang deficiency.

V004-N00978.label: 酸甘化阴
V004-N00978.englishNames: sour and sweet transforming into yin; transforming yin with sour and sweet flavors; form yin with the sour and sweet
V004-N00978.path: 治法｜治法类术语｜其他治法

V004-N00978.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V004-N00978.label: 酸甘化阴
V004-N00978.englishNames: Sour and sweet transform into yin
V004-N00978.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V004-N00978.definition: The combination of a sour and sweet flavour engenders a fluid-generating, inward and astringing function. This includes a single medicinal with both flavours or combined sour and sweet medicines.

V004-N00978.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V004-N00978.label: 酸甘化阴
V004-N00978.englishNames: form yin with the sour and sweet; sour and sweet transforming into yin

V004-N00978.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V004-N00978.label: 酸甘化阴
V004-N00978.englishNames: form yin with the sour and sweet; sour and sweet transforming into yin
V004-N00978.definition: a therapeutic method of replenishing yin blood by combined use of sour-tasted medicinals and sweettasted ones

V004-N00973.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V004-N00973.label: 清利头目
V004-N00973.englishNames: Removing Heat for Treating Head-Ocular Disease
V004-N00973.path: 中医诊断治疗技术和设备｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治法｜病症防治
V004-N00973.definition: 属病症防治通过清热泻火、潜阳降逆，而使头目清利的治疗方法。适用于火热上扰、阳亢气逆而使头目疼痛、眩晕之类病症[5]。

V004-N00973.label: 清利头目
V004-N00973.englishNames: clearing and disinhibiting the head and eyes; Removing Heat for Treating Head Ocular Disease
V004-N00973.path: 治法｜治法类术语｜其他治法

V004-N00973.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V004-N00973.label: 清利头目
V004-N00973.englishNames: clearing and disinhibiting the head and eyes; Clear the head and eyes; clearing heat, removing wind and benefiting the head and eyes; Removing Heat for Treating Head Ocular Disease
V004-N00973.pinyinNames: qing li tou mu; qīng lì tóu mù
V004-N00973.definition: A treatment method to clear heat, reduce fire, submerge yang and clear the head and eyes. It is indicated for headache, eye pain and dizziness due to upward flaming of fire heat or hyperactivity of yang qi.

V004-N00974.label: 滑利窍道
V004-N00974.englishNames: moistening and disinhibiting orifices and canals
V004-N00974.path: 治法｜治法类术语｜其他治法

V004-N00974.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V004-N00974.label: 滑利窍道
V004-N00974.englishNames: moistening and disinhibiting orifices and canals; Lubricate the orifices; clearing heat, resolving dampness and inducing urination
V004-N00974.pinyinNames: hua li qiao dao; huá lì qiào dào
V004-N00974.definition: A treatment method to lubricate and unblock orifices. It is indicated for dry orifices due to insufficiency of yin fluids.

V004-N00979.label: 辛甘化阳
V004-N00979.englishNames: transforming yang with pungent and sweet flavors; form yang with the pungent and sweet; pungent and sweet transforming into yang
V004-N00979.path: 治法｜治法类术语｜其他治法

V004-N00979.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V004-N00979.label: 辛甘化阳
V004-N00979.englishNames: Pungent and sweet transform into yang
V004-N00979.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V004-N00979.definition: The combination of a pungent and sweet flavour engenders a dispersing, outward and yang-assisting function. This includes a single medicine with both flavours or combined pungent and sweet medicines.

V004-N00979.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V004-N00979.label: 辛甘化阳
V004-N00979.englishNames: pungent and sweet transforming into yang

V004-N00979.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V004-N00979.label: 辛甘化阳
V004-N00979.englishNames: form yang with the pungent and sweet; pungent and sweet transforming into yang
V004-N00979.definition: a therapeutic method of reinforcing yang qi by combined use of pungent-tasted medicinals and sweet-tasted ones

V004-N00971.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V004-N00971.label: 宣通三焦
V004-N00971.path: 中医诊断治疗技术和设备｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治法｜脏腑治法
V004-N00971.definition:
属脏腑治法
通过理气祛邪，疏通气机，使三焦得以通利的治疗方法。适用于邪阻气滞而三焦不利的证候[5]。

V004-N00971.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V004-N00971.label: 三焦治法
V004-N00971.path: 中医诊断治疗技术和设备｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治法｜脏腑治法｜宣通三焦

V004-N00971.label: 宣通三焦
V004-N00971.englishNames: Promoting Sanjiao by Dispersion; diffusing and unblocking triple energizer
V004-N00971.path: 治法｜治法类术语｜其他治法

V004-N00971.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V004-N00971.label: 宣通三焦
V004-N00971.aliases: 三焦治法； Disperse and unblock triple energizer
V004-N00971.englishNames: Promoting Sanjiao by Dispersion; Disperse and unblock the three jiao; diffusing and unblocking triple energizer; diffusing and unblocking the threee jiao
V004-N00971.pinyinNames: xuan tong san jiao; xuān tōng sān jiāo
V004-N00971.definition: A treatment method to regulate qi, eliminate pathogenic factors and unblock the three jiao. It is indicated for pathogenic factors impairing the qi flow of the three jiao.

V004-N00989.label: 解毒安胎
V004-N00989.path: 治法｜治法类术语｜其他治法

V004-N00990.label: 以毒攻毒
V004-N00990.path: 治法｜治法类术语｜其他治法

V004-N00990.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V004-N00990.label: 以毒攻毒
V004-N00990.englishNames: fighting toxin with toxin; predominating over toxin with toxin; Remove toxins with toxins
V004-N00990.pinyinNames: yi dong gong dong; yǐ dú gōng dú
V004-N00990.definition: A treatment method to remove toxins with poisonous medicines.

V004-N00982.label: 肺肾相生
V004-N00982.englishNames: mutual promotion between lung and kidney
V004-N00982.definition: 肺肾或肺肾阴液之间的相互资生。

V004-N00982.label: 金生水
V004-N00982.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜五行学说｜五行相生
V004-N00982.definition: 金对水具有促进、助长、资生的作用。

V004-N00982.label: 肺肾相生
V004-N00982.aliases: 肺肾同源； 金水相生
V004-N00982.englishNames: Mutual Promotion Of The Lung And The Kidney
V004-N00982.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜藏象学说原理｜藏象的一般性概念｜脏腑关系
V004-N00982.definition: 肺属金，肾属水。根据五行学说，肺金和肾水是母子关系，故又称“金水相生”。两者在生理上互相滋生，病变时互相影响。

V004-N00982.label: 金水相生
V004-N00982.englishNames: mutual promotion between metal and water
V004-N00982.path: 治法｜治法类术语｜其他治法

V004-N00982.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V004-N00982.label: 金水相生
V004-N00982.englishNames: mutual promotion between metal and water; Mutual generation between metal and water
V004-N00982.pinyinNames: jin shui xiang sheng; jīn shuǐ xiāng shēng
V004-N00982.definition: A treatment method to tonify the kidney and nourish the lung for lung deficiency and kidney deficiency, since the lung (metal) and kidney (water) mutually support physiologically and mutually affect pathologically.

V004-N00982.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V004-N00982.label: 金水相生
V004-N00982.englishNames: mutual generation between metal and water

V004-N00977.label: 强筋壮骨
V004-N00977.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜内治法
V004-N00977.definition: 用具有强筋健骨作用的方药，或通过练功及其他方法,使筋骨强健，以治疗素体虚弱或伤后、病后体虚而筋骨不健病证的方法。

V004-N00977.label: 强筋壮骨
V004-N00977.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜骨伤科学｜治疗
V004-N00977.definition: 通过练功或服药等，以使筋骨强健的治疗方法。适用于素体虚弱或伤后、病后体虚而筋骨不健者。

V004-N00977.label: 强筋壮骨
V004-N00977.englishNames: strengthening tendons and bones; strengthening sinews and invigorating bones; Strengthening Tendons and Bones
V004-N00977.path: 治法｜治法类术语｜其他治法

V004-N00977.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V004-N00977.label: 强筋壮骨
V004-N00977.englishNames: strengthening tendons and bones; strengthening sinews and invigorating bones; Strengthen the sinews and bones; Strengthening Tendons and Bones
V004-N00977.pinyinNames: qiang jin zhuang gu; qiáng jīn zhuàng gǔ
V004-N00977.definition: A treatment method to strengthen the sinews or bones through exercise or taking medicine. It is indicated for weak sinews/bones due to heredity, trauma or chronic diseases.

V004-N00583.label: 温里法
V004-N00583.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜内治法
V004-N00583.definition: 用药性温热，具有温阳散寒作用的方药，治疗寒邪内侵,或阳虚内寒病证的治法。

V004-N00583.label: 温里法
V004-N00583.aliases: Interior Warming； Warming Methods； 温法； 温里
V004-N00583.definition: 用药性温热，具有温阳散寒作用的方药，治疗寒邪内侵，或阳虚内寒病证的治法。

V004-N00583.label: 温里法
V004-N00583.aliases: 温法； 温里； Interior Warming； Warming Methods
V004-N00583.englishNames: warming interior method; internal-warming therapy; Warming Interior Method

V004-N00583.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V004-N00583.label: 温里法
V004-N00583.aliases: 温法； 温里； Interior Warming； Warming Methods
V004-N00583.englishNames: methods to warm the interior; warming interior method; internal-warming therapy; Warming interior methods; Warming Interior Method
V004-N00583.pinyinNames: wen li fa; wēn lǐ fǎ
V004-N00583.definition: Treatment methods to warm and unblock the zang–fu organs and meridians, supplement yang and dissipate cold

V004-N00583.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V004-N00583.label: 温里法

V004-N00600.label: 温经散寒
V004-N00600.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜内治法
V004-N00600.definition: 用具有温阳散寒通经作用的方药，治疗寒滞经脉证的治法。

V004-N00600.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V004-N00600.label: 温经祛寒
V004-N00600.path: 中医诊断治疗技术和设备｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治法｜寒热治法｜祛寒
V004-N00600.definition: 属温经；属祛寒具有温阳散寒通经作用，适用于寒滞经脉证的治疗方法[5] 。

V004-N00600.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V004-N00600.label: 温经散寒
V004-N00600.path: 中医诊断治疗技术和设备｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治法｜寒热治法｜祛寒｜温经祛寒

V004-N00600.label: 温经散寒法
V004-N00600.aliases: Warming Meridians； Warming Meridians Dispelling Cold； 温经； 温经祛寒
V004-N00600.definition: 具有温阳散寒通经作用，适用于寒滞经脉证的治疗方法。

V004-N01038.definition: 留针后再在针刺部位拔罐的方法。

V004-N01038.label: 针罐法
V004-N01038.path: 中医操作/方法｜治疗方法/操作｜其他疗法｜针灸疗法｜拔罐法
V004-N01038.definition: 指针刺与拔罐相配合的治疗方法。

V004-N01053.label: 摩乳疗法
V004-N01053.path: 中医操作/方法｜治疗方法/操作｜其他疗法｜推拿｜保健按摩疗法
V004-N01053.definition: 是中青年女性自己或他人在乳房部进行按摩，以丰乳、催乳、通乳和防治乳腺炎等疾病的一种保健疗法。

V004-N01057.label: 正骨手法
V004-N01057.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜骨伤科学｜治疗
V004-N01057.definition: 又称“整骨手法”。治疗骨折、脱位等筋骨损伤的各种手法总称。

V004-N01057.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V004-N01057.label: 正骨疗法
V004-N01057.path: 中医诊断治疗技术和设备｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治法
V004-N01057.definition: 属治法 骨折、脱位及软组织损伤的整复治疗方法[13]

V004-N01057.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V004-N01057.label: 正骨手法
V004-N01057.path: 中医诊断治疗技术和设备｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治法｜正骨疗法
V004-N01057.definition: 属正骨疗法；宜用专指词骨伤治法之一，用手的一定技巧动作，治疗骨折、脱位[13] 。

V004-N01057.label: 正骨疗法
V004-N01057.path: 中医操作/方法｜治疗方法/操作｜其他疗法
V004-N01057.definition: 骨伤治法之一。用手的动作，治疗骨折、脱臼及软组织损伤的方法。

V004-N01057.label: 整复疗法
V004-N01057.path: 中医操作/方法｜治疗方法/操作｜其他疗法｜正骨疗法
V004-N01057.definition: 通过手法或以手法为主，并借助于器械，使移位的筋骨恢复其原来的位置，以治疗筋骨损伤的一种方法。本法分为诊断和治疗两个部分，即首先通过触摸伤处及X线诊断筋骨损伤的部位与程度，然后运用手法使其复位。适用于骨折、脱位和伤筋。

V004-N01057.label: 正骨手法
V004-N01057.path: 中医操作/方法｜治疗方法/操作｜其他疗法｜正骨疗法
V004-N01057.definition: 医疗技术名。运用手法诊断治疗骨关节损伤之技术。《理伤续断方》提出：拔伸、用力收入骨、捺正等手法。《医宗金鉴》(1742年)卷八十七则总结发展为摸、接、端、提、按、摩、推、拿等八种手法。现代则总结出：手摸心会、拔伸牵引、旋转屈伸、提按端挤、摇摆触碰、按摩推拿、夹挤分骨、折顶回旋等中西医结合新八法。此外，还有拉、卡、捏、抖等手法

V004-N01057.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V004-N01057.label: 正骨手法

V004-N01059.label: 理筋手法
V004-N01059.englishNames: therapeutic manipulation for injured soft tissue
V004-N01059.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜骨伤科学｜治疗
V004-N01059.definition: 又称“治筋手法”。根据筋腱走行方向行推、摩、揉、按等操作，治疗筋伤的手法。

V004-N01059.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V004-N01059.label: 理筋手法

V004-N01059.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V004-N01059.label: 理筋手法
V004-N01059.definition: a collective term for various manipulations for restoring and treating injured soft tissues

V004-N01081.label: 运动疗法
V004-N01081.path: 中医操作/方法｜养生调护方法/操作
V004-N01081.definition: 运动疗法也称医疗体育，是一种应用人体生物力学活动的治疗方法，目前已成为康复治疗的主要方法之一。由于骨盆骨折或髋臼骨折的存在以及由骨折所造成的周围韧带、肌肉和软组织损伤破坏了骨盆及髋关节周围运动器官的形态结构，不仅直接限制了功能，而且由于功能的减退或丧失，又会促使形态进一步恶化。要改变这种情况，就要恢复必需的功能活动，以促使形态和功能向好的方向发展。运动能加快局部血液循环，增加髋关节滑液分泌，改善软骨营养;并可牵伸骨折及髋关节周围的韧带、肌肉和软组织，促使挛缩组织延伸，使粘连得以松解，恢复和改善关节活动范围;可使肌纤维增粗，萎缩肌肉逐渐肥大，使肌力和耐力逐渐得到增强和恢复，从而改善主动运动能力，有利于维持骨代谢平衡，减轻骨组织脱钙，使骨皮质增厚，从而改善骨的支撑和承重能力。总之，合理和系统的功能锻炼对于改善和恢复骨盆或髋臼骨折后髋关节的运动功能并且促进形态恢复是至关重要的

V004-N01086.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V004-N01086.label: 布托牵引

V004-N01093.label: 冷敷疗法
V004-N01093.path: 中医操作/方法｜治疗方法/操作｜自然类疗法｜环境疗法｜冷疗法
V004-N01093.definition: 是用冰水毛巾或冰冷的物体放置在人体的某一部位，使局部毛细血管收缩，起到散热、降温、止血、止痛及消除肿胀等作用的一种物理疗法。

V004-N01099.label: 溻渍疗法
V004-N01099.path: 中医操作/方法｜治疗方法/操作｜其他疗法
V004-N01099.definition: 是用消毒布巾蘸植物药水趁热渍于患处，反复渍溻，以达到治病目的的一种方法。主要用于治疗体表急性炎症。

V004-N01124.label: 放痧疗法
V004-N01124.englishNames: Therapy of Letting out Sha-Evil; Therapy of Pricking to Cause Little Bleeding
V004-N01124.path: 中医操作/方法｜治疗方法/操作｜其他疗法｜刮搓疗法｜痧疗法｜直接痧法
V004-N01124.definition: 以针刺静脉或点刺穴位出血，用于因痧而致疾病的施治方法。适用于中暑、胃肠道疾患。

V004-N01137.label: 铍针疗法
V004-N01137.path: 刺法灸法｜针灸其他疗法
V004-N01137.definition: 用特制的铍针样针具割治患部以治疗疾病的方法。

V004-N01196.label: 胶圈套扎疗法
V004-N01196.pinyinNames: jiao quan tao zha liao fa
V004-N01196.path: 中医操作/方法｜治疗方法/操作｜其他疗法｜结扎疗法｜套扎疗法
V004-N01196.definition: 通过内痔套扎器将小乳胶圈套入痔核根部，利用胶圈的紧箍力阻止血供，促使痔核缺血、坏死脱落，进而治愈内痔。

V004-N01211.label: 枯痔法
V004-N01211.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜肛肠科学｜治疗
V004-N01211.definition: 将枯痔钉插入痔核中心，或用枯痔散敷于痔核表面，使痔组织发生干枯坏死脱落或硬化萎缩的治疗方法。

V004-N01211.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V004-N01211.label: 枯痔法
V004-N01211.path: 中医诊断治疗技术和设备｜中医外科手术｜中医肛肠手术
V004-N01211.definition: 属中医肛肠手术是以腐蚀枯脱、燥湿收敛等作用的药物所制成的散剂，涂搽于内痔核，使痔核发生凝固性坏死、萎缩、脱落而治愈痔疮的一种方法[60]。

V004-N01252.label: 气功疗法
V004-N01252.path: 原理和经验｜经验｜中医学说｜形神学说｜形神疾病｜形神疾病辨治
V004-N01252.definition: 是通过自我控制意识、呼吸及身体姿式，来调整内脏活动以达到形神统一的一种疗法。

V004-N01256.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V004-N01256.label: 内养功
V004-N01256.path: 中医诊断治疗技术和设备｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治法｜气功｜静功
V004-N01256.definition: 属静功以默念字句与呼吸锻炼相结合的一种功法[13]。

V004-N01262.label: 五禽戏
V004-N01262.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜推拿学、养生学、康复学
V004-N01262.definition: 模仿虎、鹿、熊、猿、鸟(鹤)五种动物动作，以保健强身的导引方法。

V004-N01263.label: 易筋经

V004-N01263.definition: A traditional health-building exercise to stretch the body, strengthen the sinews, bones and ligaments and regulate the meridians and zang–fu organs.

V004-N01264.label: 太极拳
V004-N01264.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜推拿学、养生学、康复学
V004-N01264.definition: 中国传统武术中，每一个动作圆柔连贯，每一式都是绵绵不断，犹如太极图的拳术。

V004-N01264.label: 太极拳

V004-N01264.label: 太极拳
V004-N01264.definition: An ancient Chinese martial art practiced for both defence training and health benefits. It is a combination of breathing, mental focus, and physical movements, whose intention is to cultivate the practitioner’s internal qi. It is rooted in the philosophies of Confucianism, Daoism and Chinese medicine, and concepts of Taiji, yin-yang and the Five Elements.
